description_long: This hot dog features a plump sausage nestled inside a golden-brown, toasted bun. The bun appears soft and slightly glossy, with a light crust on the exterior. On top of the sausage, there is a generous layer of melted cheese and a scattering of crispy fried onions, adding texture and visual appeal. The sausage is partially visible from the ends, with its reddish-brown color contrasting against the yellowish bun and cheese. The hot dog is presented on a rectangular wooden cutting board, which serves as a neutral background. No visible packaging surrounds the hot dog, and the overall appearance is appetizing and fresh.
description: A toasted bun holds a sausage topped with melted cheese and crispy fried onions, presented on a wooden cutting board. The hot dog looks fresh, with a golden bun and visible condiments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hot dog from the side, highlighting the toasted bun, melted cheese, and crispy onions on top.
description_view_1: End view reveals the sausage inside the bun, with condiments and toppings visible along the length.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirrors the front, showing the bun's texture and toppings, with the sausage end peeking out.
description_view_3: Rear end view focuses on the exposed sausage tip and the alignment of toppings along the bun.
